objective: Validate all 8 acceptance criteria for the run_explore bounded agent loop (mode steering, two-level tool gating, Balanced phase machine, bounds, tests) after revision fixing AC-7 byte_bound_terminates_loop.

AC-2 PASS: build_full_toolset includes all 7 structural ops; shell tools dispatched from cfg.allowed_tools with root as cwd.
AC-3 PASS: two-level gating confirmed — toolset array omission + corrective_refusal(); shell args as Vec<String>.
AC-4 PASS: modes as data; Balanced 3-phase machine; BALANCED_RECON_TURNS=2.
AC-5 PASS: turn bound (MAX_TURNS=25) and byte bound (MAX_TOOL_RESULT_BYTES=131072) both tested; Ok+truncated on both paths.
AC-6 PASS: ClientError::Connection → ExploreError::ProviderDown; tested by connection_error_maps_to_provider_down.

AC-8 PASS: clippy -D warnings clean; no fastcontext; no clap; 177 tests all pass.
ADVISORY (non-blocking): aggressive_toolset_same_as_standard is a self-comparison — would not catch dispatch-path divergence for Aggressive mode.
REGRESSION: 0 regressions across 126 unit + 32 integration + 18 CLI + 1 doc-test.
